title: hyoseris simplex
intro: Hyoseris simplex, also known as the stinking chamomile or elephant's ears, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Hyoseris simplex include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving menstrual cramps and digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Hyoseris simplex is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
